fields.name: gatedEvent
fields.description: The event that triggered the approval request.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current state of the approval process.

fields.name: reviewer
fields.description: The user or system responsible for reviewing the request.

fields.name: requestedAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the approval request was initiated.
fields.synonyms: creation time, request date, submission time

fields.name: decidedAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when a decision was made on the request.
fields.synonyms: decision time, resolved at, completed at

fields.name: escalatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the request was escalated.
fields.synonyms: escalation time, escalation timestamp, escalated time

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-form text providing additional context or details.

events.name: APPROVE
events.description: Signals that an approval request has been approved.

events.name: DENY
events.description: Signals that an approval request has been denied.

events.name: ApprovalGranted
events.description: Signals that an approval process has been successfully completed.

events.name: ApprovalDenied
events.description: Indicates an approval request has been denied.

events.name: ApprovalRequestLoaded
events.description: Indicates an approval request has been successfully loaded.

events.name: ApprovalRequestLoadFailed
events.description: Indicates failure to load an approval request.
events.synonyms: load error, failed load, request failure

events.name: ApprovalRequestReviewed
events.description: Signals that an approval request has been reviewed.

events.name: ApprovalRequestReviewFailed
events.description: Indicates a failure to load or process an approval request for review.
events.synonyms: load error, failed review, processing failure

overridableConfigKeys.label: Approver roles
overridableConfigKeys.description: Roles eligible to approve. The host application enforces role-gating on the page.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Auto-approve below threshold
overridableConfigKeys.description: Skip the review queue when the gated event's value is below the threshold. v1.0 declarative only.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Require approval
overridableConfigKeys.description: Require sign-off before a record is finalized. Off by default.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: enable, turn on, enforce, require, activate, apply, switch on, approval, needs approval, sign-off, signed off, review before, gatekeeper, editor approval, publishing approval, draft approval, content review, requires approval, manager approval, supervisor approval, admin approval, before going live

overridableConfigKeys.label: Escalation hours
overridableConfigKeys.description: Hours a request can sit pending before escalating. v1.0 declarative only; per-row escalation needs loop-with-emit primitive (gap).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Escalation roles
overridableConfigKeys.description: Roles notified when a request escalates (compose sibling std-notify-on-event).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Table look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for the data table rendered by this atom.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Auto-approve threshold
overridableConfigKeys.description: Below this value, requests should be auto-approved. v1.0 declarative only; wiring lands in v1.1 (gap).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Value field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Payload field name to compare against threshold (e.g. 'amount' on a RefundRequested event). v1.0 declarative only.
